title: Position repo as a starter template
description: Rewrite README to describe what's included for someone using the repo as a GitHub template. Mark the repo as a template via gh CLI so the 'Use this template' button appears on github.com.
verification: README opens with a 'GitHub template — Use this template' callout
README has a 'What's included' section listing the harness subsystems, scaffolding, and CI
README has a 'First things to edit' section for new template users
gh repo view --json isTemplate returns isTemplate: true
notes: Re-scoped from old id `docs-001` to `docs-template` as part of the harness-features rename (PR #6). The GitHub template flag was already set on the repo via `gh repo edit --template` during PR #5 work; this PR carries the README rewrite onto post-harness-features main.
